positive: Stylized geometric arrangement featuring a celestial compass rose intersecting with organic forest fauna. The design should depict stylized, minimalistic mountain peaks forming the outer boundary, filled with complex, interconnected elements: glowing stylized flora, crescent moon phases, scattered constellations, and abstract celestial bodies. Use strong, clean silhouette lines and limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, muted forest green, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for repeating apparel print or single chest graphic. High contrast, crisp lines, vector art aesthetic, designed for screen printing on fabric.
